message: Node started: Given the entropy S(x, T) and the internal energy U(T) of a freely jointed chain, derive the adiabatic constraint S(x, T) = constant. Use this to find the relationship between temperature T and extension x during an adiabatic process. Then, use the relation F = -dU/dx (at constant S) or F = T(dS/dx) to find the force F(x).
